sentences.arabic: حِينَ تَخْطُو قَدَماكَ داخِلَ الأَسْواقِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ القَدِيمَةِ، تَسْتَقْبِلُكَ رَوائِحُ التَّوابِلِ النَّفّاذَةِ الَّتِي تَحْمِلُ فِي طَيّاتِها حَكايا القَوافِلِ التِّجارِيَّةِ الغابِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada zakoračite unutar starih narodnih pijaca, dočekuju vas prodorni mirisi začina koji u sebi nose priče o drevnim trgovačkim karavanima.
sentences.translationEn: When you step inside the old traditional markets, you are greeted by pungent spice smells that carry within them stories of ancient trade caravans.

sentences.arabic: تُرَصُّ أَكْوامُ الزَّعْفَرانِ وَالكَمُّونِ وَالقِرْفَةِ فِي أَوْعِيَةٍ خَشَبِيَّةٍ، مُشَكِّلَةً لَوْحَةً فَنِّيَّةً تَسُرُّ النّاظِرِينَ وَتُحَفِّزُ حَواسَّ التَّذَوُّقِ لَدَيْهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Hrpe šafrana, kumina i cimeta poredane su u drvene posude, formirajući umjetničku sliku koja raduje posmatrače i stimuliše njihova čula ukusa.
sentences.translationEn: Heaps of saffron, cumin, and cinnamon are stacked in wooden bowls, forming an artistic tableau that pleases onlookers and stimulates their sense of taste.

sentences.arabic: وَيُؤَكِّدُ خُبَراءُ الطَّهْيِ أَنَّ السِّرَّ فِي نَكْهَةِ الأَطْباقِ الشَّرْقِيَّةِ يَكْمُنُ فِي مَهارَةِ العَطّارِ الَّذِي يَمْزِجُ هَذِهِ المَوادَّ بِنِسَبٍ دَقِيقَةٍ وَسِرِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kulinarski stručnjaci potvrđuju da tajna okusa istočnjačkih jela leži u vještini travara koji miješa ove sastojke u preciznim i tajnim omjerima.
sentences.translationEn: Culinary experts confirm that the secret to the flavor of Eastern dishes lies in the skill of the herbalist who blends these materials in precise and secret proportions.

sentences.arabic: وَإِذا ما أُرِيدَ لِلْوَلِيمَةِ أَنْ تَكُونَ مُتَكامِلَةً، فَلا بُدَّ مِنَ اخْتِيارِ البُهاراتِ الَّتِي تَتَوافَقُ مَعَ نَوْعِ اللَّحْمِ أَوْ الخُضارِ المُسْتَخْدَمِ فِي الطَّبْخِ.
sentences.translation: Ako se želi da gozba bude potpuna, neophodno je odabrati začine koji su usklađeni s vrstom mesa ili povrća koje se koristi u kuhanju.
sentences.translationEn: If a feast is intended to be complete, it is necessary to choose spices that are compatible with the type of meat or vegetables used in cooking.

sentences.arabic: فَهَذِهِ المَساحِيقُ المُلَوَّنَةُ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ إِضافاتٍ، بَلْ هِيَ رُوحُ المَطْبَخِ العَرَبِيِّ وَسِرُّ تَمَيُّزِهِ الَّذِي يَعْبُرُ الحُدُودَ وَالقاراتِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi obojeni prahovi nisu samo dodaci, već su duša arapske kuhinje i tajna njene izvrsnosti koja prelazi granice i kontinente.
sentences.translationEn: These colored powders are not just additives, but rather the soul of Arabic cuisine and the secret of its excellence that crosses borders and continents.
